content.speakerText: How do I log into the expense system? I forgot my password.
content.speakerTextCn: 报销系统怎么登录？我忘记密码了。

options.text: You should call the IT department immediately.
You can reset it via the portal—just click 'Forgot Password'.
You need to buy a new login key from the store.
Just use your personal email address.

content.explanation: 正确答案是 'You can reset it via the portal—just click 'Forgot Password'.'，因为这是公司系统标准的密码重置流程。选项1虽然合理但不够高效，不是直接解决方案；选项3完全错误，公司系统无需购买密钥；选项4错误，必须使用工号邮箱而非私人邮箱。

content.speakerText: I can't access the expense system. Where is it located?
content.speakerTextCn: 我无法访问报销系统，它在哪里？

options.text: It's on the public internet, just search for 'expense system'.
The system's on the company intranet. Need me to send you the link?
You have to install an app from the Apple Store.
It's only available on Friday afternoons.

content.explanation: 正确答案是 'The system's on the company intranet. Need me to send you the link?'，因为企业系统通常只在内网访问。选项1错误，内网系统不会公开在互联网；选项3错误，系统不是通过App Store安装；选项4无依据，系统应全天可用。

content.speakerText: What email should I use to log in to the expense system?
content.speakerTextCn: 我该用哪个邮箱登录报销系统？

options.text: You can use any email you registered with last year.

content.explanation: 正确答案是 'Just use your work email.'，因为企业系统要求使用公司分配的工号邮箱。选项1和2使用私人邮箱，不符合公司安全政策；选项4模糊且不准确，系统只认当前���效工号邮箱。
